H-OS-L1.name: Pebble
H-OS-L1.sphere: n=95, mean=7.15, std=1.78, confidence=strong. Highest n in dataset with tight distribution. Qualitative (29) shows 12/29 noticeable improvement and high music enjoyment. YouTube reach (30) is strongest in HEALING; AutoGluon prediction (6.859) trails observed efficacy.
H-OS-L1.sphere_plain: The most-watched overstim protocol that consistently helps people feel calmer, especially when used for sleep or stress relief.

H-OS-L2.name: Rainfall
H-OS-L2.sphere: n=51, mean=6.92, std=1.73, confidence=strong. Solid performer with 10/21 noticeable improvement. Qualitative mixed (10 liked, 6 neutral). Views minimal (5). Predicted score (6.86) aligns with observed mean.
H-OS-L2.sphere_plain: A helpful tool for overstimulation, with many finding the rhythm settling, though not everyone feels a strong change.

H-OS-L3.name: Glacier
H-OS-L3.sphere: n=47, mean=7.04, std=1.68, confidence=meaningful. Strong rhythm satisfaction (20/23 balanced/very settling). 8/23 used for sleep. Views low (8). Model prediction matches observed.
H-OS-L3.sphere_plain: Calm and steady, this helped many relax, especially those trying to sleep. Works best with patience.

H-AX-L1.name: Meadow
H-AX-L1.sphere: n=67, mean=7.22, std=1.93, confidence=strong. Qualitative (n=23) reports moderate-to-significant improvement settling at ~10 minutes. YouTube reach minimal (7 views). AutoGluon predicts anxiety-zone score 7.838, aligning with observed performance. Distribution shows plateau across scores 5-9 with no severe negative skew.
H-AX-L1.sphere_plain: A reliable anxiety reliever that helps most people feel calmer within about 10 minutes. The steady rhythm felt balanced to listeners.

H-AX-L2.name: Cottage
H-AX-L2.sphere: n=48, mean=6.94, std=1.62, confidence=meaningful. Qualitative (20) indicates moderate improvement with mixed music opinions (9 liked, 5 neutral). Settle time clusters at 5 minutes. YouTube data absent. Sibling to AX-L1 but shows 0.28-point lower mean; groove differences warrant investigation.
H-AX-L2.sphere_plain: Helps with anxiety but feels more mixed – some really like it while others find it just okay. Works faster (within 5 minutes).

H-AX-L3.name: Valley
H-AX-L3.sphere: n=36, mean=7.08, std=1.89, confidence=meaningful. Polarized distribution with 5 zeros and strong 9-10 presence. Qualitative (20) notes slower settle time (~10 minutes). No YouTube signal. Model predicts 7.84 for anxiety zone, suggesting potential for modest enhancement.
H-AX-L3.sphere_plain: A steady option for anxiety that takes a bit longer to settle in (about 10 minutes). Some people notice stronger effects than others.

H-CR-L1.name: Anchor
H-CR-L1.sphere: n=43, mean=6.35, std=1.7, confidence=meaningful. Crisis protocol expectedly lower than HEALING mean but 53% positive. Qualitative (24) highlights significant improvement in one-third of listeners. Settle within 5-10 minutes. AutoGluon predicts 7.955 for crisis zone, exceeding observed by 1.6 points.
H-CR-L1.sphere_plain: Supports crisis moments – many report relief within minutes, though experiences vary significantly.

H-CR-L2.name: Harbor
H-CR-L2.sphere: n=33, mean=6.52, std=1.7, confidence=meaningful. Maintains crisis protocol pattern with 55% positive. Qualitative (16) notes quick settling (~5 minutes). Model elevates this to top crisis protocol, yet YouTube data absent. Potential groove-based efficacy difference vs CR-L1.
H-CR-L2.sphere_plain: Calms distress quickly for some listeners via its very settling rhythm. Not everyone connects with the groove.

H-CR-L3.name: Horizon
H-CR-L3.sphere: n=27, mean=6.52, std=1.91, confidence=meaningful. Fastest settle (immediate for 7/19) but 4/19 disliked music. Bimodal qualitative response. Model does not prioritize this variant. Distribution shows higher variance than siblings.
H-CR-L3.sphere_plain: Immediate relief for a few listeners, while others need more time. Some dislike the music despite quick settling.

H-SL-L1.name: Lantern
H-SL-L1.sphere: n=54, mean=7.19, std=1.86, confidence=strong. Highest mean in sleep protocols. Qualitative (15) notes quick improvement (5/15 settled in 5 minutes). YouTube minimal (4 views). AutoGluon predicts 7.54, slightly above observed.
H-SL-L1.sphere_plain: The highest-rated sleep protocol that helps many people wind down within minutes with its gentle rhythm.

H-SL-L2.name: Hammock
H-SL-L2.sphere: n=45, mean=7.09, std=1.55, confidence=meaningful. Slightly lower pct_pos (67%) with concerning qualitative: 3/15 did not settle and 3/15 found rhythm "Too busy". Caregiver-heavy listener type (6/15). Model predicts 7.54, ignoring groove differences.
H-SL-L2.sphere_plain: Some caregivers find this helpful for sleep support, but a few listeners find the rhythm too active for deep rest.

H-SL-L3.name: Midnight
H-SL-L3.sphere: n=28, mean=7.07, std=1.68, confidence=meaningful. Reports 8/22 settled within 5 minutes. 6/22 noticed significant improvement. Music opinions balanced. YouTube data minimal (3).
H-SL-L3.sphere_plain: A gentle sleep aid that quietly helps many unwind, showing benefits early even with repeated use.

T-FC-L1.name: Compass
T-FC-L1.sphere: n=41, mean=6.46, std=1.82, confidence=meaningful. PROBLEMATIC protocol with 9/23 rhythm complaints ("slightly busy"). Qualitative shows 10/23 noticeable improvement despite low mean. Model predicts 7.728 for focus zone, indicating 1.3-point efficacy gap.
T-FC-L1.sphere_plain: Mixed results for focus – some gain clarity but many find the rhythm slightly distracting. Might not suit all listeners.

T-FC-L2.name: Waypoint
T-FC-L2.sphere: n=32, mean=7.19, std=1.6, confidence=meaningful. Stronger performer with 5/17 significant improvement. Rhythm split: 5/17 slightly busy. Views absent (4). AutoGluon silent, consistent with mid-tier ranking.
T-FC-L2.sphere_plain: Helps some gain clarity, though not everyone connects with the rhythm. Benefits build over time.

T-FC-L3.name: Summit
T-FC-L3.sphere: n=35, mean=7.63, std=1.97, confidence=strong. HIGHEST mean across THRIVING. 11/29 significant improvement. Model aligns (predicts 7.728). Views moderate (15). Distribution shows high ceiling effect.
T-FC-L3.sphere_plain: One of the best for sharpening focus – many felt a clear shift, often within 10 minutes. Strongest focus protocol.

T-CF-L1.name: Ember
T-CF-L1.sphere: n=34, mean=6.74, std=1.73, confidence=meaningful. STRUGGLING protocol with only 53% positive and mode at 6-7. Qualitative (21) notes slight improvements (8/21). Views absent. AutoGluon does not prioritize, aligning with modest performance.
T-CF-L1.sphere_plain: A creative boost for some listeners, but many notice only slight changes. Might need a different feel.

T-CF-L2.name: Current
T-CF-L2.sphere: n=24, mean=6.79, std=1.41, confidence=meaningful. Modest uplift over L1 with 5/15 significant improvement. 6/15 loved music. Settle time ~10 minutes. Views minimal (2). Stable performer but unexceptional.
T-CF-L2.sphere_plain: A few find real creative flow here, and many like how it sounds. Settles in about 10 minutes.

T-CF-L3.name: Aurora
T-CF-L3.sphere: n=18, mean=7.28, std=1.32, confidence=developing. Highest mean in creative flow protocols. 6/25 reported significant improvement. Views absent (7). Developing data suggests groove optimization potential.
T-CF-L3.sphere_plain: Several felt a strong lift in creative thinking, especially after 5 to 10 minutes of listening.

T-MB-L1.name: Stone
T-MB-L1.sphere: n=25, mean=7.04, std=1.34, confidence=meaningful. Stable outcome with slow settling (9/23 needed 20 minutes). Views minimal (3). Model predicts 7.693 for maintenance zone.
T-MB-L1.sphere_plain: A steady aid for daily balance, though some took longer to feel its calming effect.

T-MB-L2.name: Axis
T-MB-L2.sphere: n=22, mean=6.68, std=2.03, confidence=meaningful. HIGH-VARIANCE protocol with drift signal (sim=0.696). 7/16 rhythm complaints (slightly busy). Views absent. Analysis flagged as unstable across runs.
T-MB-L2.sphere_plain: Some liked it, but others found the rhythm a little too active for maintaining calm. Performance varies.

T-MB-L3.name: Orbit
T-MB-L3.sphere: n=14, mean=6.93, std=1.73, confidence=developing. Moderate outcome but 4/19 did NOT settle. Model predicts 7.693 for maintenance. Drift (sim=0.706) suggests unstable analytical framing.
T-MB-L3.sphere_plain: Helped some maintain balance, but a few didn’t settle into it, even after repeated use.

X-ME-L1.name: Breeze
X-ME-L1.sphere: n=39, mean=6.74, std=1.94, confidence=meaningful. TRANSFORMINGâ€™s strongest model favorite – predicted across 6 zones (highest 8.23). 10/22 loved music. Views low (8). Cross-bucket signal warrants protocol elevation.
X-ME-L1.sphere_plain: One of the most versatile protocols – model suggests it could help across many states, though current use is limited.

X-ME-L2.name: Sunrise
X-ME-L2.sphere: n=25, mean=6.76, std=1.71, confidence=meaningful. Twin to L1 with 7/15 significant improvement. Model routes identically. Views absent (8). Clustered semantically with X-ME-1/3 (sim>0.93).
X-ME-L2.sphere_plain: Similar to X-ME-L1 with strong music enjoyment, helping some listeners feel uplifted or calmer within about 20 minutes.

X-ME-L3.name: Updraft
X-ME-L3.sphere: n=18, mean=6.28, std=1.74, confidence=developing. Lowest in series with 5/25 no effect. Rhythm split: 9/25 very settling, 9/25 balanced. Model still includes in cross-bucket routes. Drift (0.781).
X-ME-L3.sphere_plain: Mixed results for mood – some feel better quickly, but many report no significant change or slower settling.

X-MD-L1.name: Footpath
X-MD-L1.sphere: n=22, mean=6.36, std=2.01, confidence=meaningful. LOWEST pct_pos (45%) in dataset. Qualitative mixed (5/17 moderate improvement). Model predicts 7.876 for motivation zone – 1.5-point gap. Views absent.
X-MD-L1.sphere_plain: Some felt a lift in motivation, but more listeners reported only slight improvement. Could use stronger entrainment.

X-MD-L2.name: Trail
X-MD-L2.sphere: n=14, mean=6.21, std=1.63, confidence=developing. ABDICATING performance with 5/21 only moderate improvement. Settle slow (20 minutes for 5/21). Model routing inconsistent (from anxiety/crisis zones). Analytically isolated (mean_sim=0.692).
X-MD-L2.sphere_plain: Slightly better than X-MD-L1 for motivation, but still many listeners report only modest improvement after 20 minutes.

X-MD-L3.name: Switchback
X-MD-L3.sphere: n=13, mean=7.15, std=2.38, confidence=developing. HIGH-VARIANCE exception in Motivation protocols. 8/17 moderate improvement. Drift extreme (sim=0.659). Model does not predict this spike; environment? groove?
X-MD-L3.sphere_plain: Surprisingly strong motivation boost reported by about half the listeners, alongside some who noticed little change.

X-MC-L1.name: Cavern
X-MC-L1.sphere: n=24, mean=6.75, std=1.62, confidence=meaningful. Modest performer with 2/25 worsened state reports. Drift (0.731). Views modest (8). AutoGluon routes to mind clarity zone (7.538), exceeding observed by 0.8 points.
X-MC-L1.sphere_plain: Most listeners report clearer thinking after about 10 minutes, though a few found it worsened their thoughts.

X-MC-L2.name: Starlight
X-MC-L2.sphere: n=16, mean=6.81, std=1.64, confidence=developing. Slight edge over L1 with 7/20 significant improvement. 12/20 found rhythm very settling. Views moderate (12). Model supports as best mind clarity protocol.
X-MC-L2.sphere_plain: Several reported clearer thinking, especially when studying or relaxing. Rhythm felt very calming.

X-MC-L3.name: Cosmos
X-MC-L3.sphere: n=10, mean=5.7, std=2.45, confidence=developing. ALARM protocol with bimodal distribution (gap at 6-8). 4/17 disliked music. Views minimal (8). Model does not elevate; data too thin for conclusions.
X-MC-L3.sphere_plain: Results were all over the place – some found it helpful, others didn’t connect at all.

sphere_commentary.overview:
The dataset reveals moderate-to-strong efficacy across series, with HEALING protocols demonstrating highest listener consistency and reach, THRIVING showing elevated mean scores in focus protocols despite smaller samples, and TRANSFORMING exhibiting structural strain with lower averages and higher variance. All analyzers independently flagged the low YouTube viewership as a critical bottleneck.
• HEALING protocols cluster around 7.0 mean with narrow std (1.77), supporting their nervous system regulation design.
• THRIVING protocols achieve the highest single-protocol scores (T-FC-L3 mean=7.63) but show pronounced tiering (L3 variants outperform L1/L2).
• TRANSFORMING shows bifurcated efficacy with ASCENT protocols performing most variably (range: 5.7-7.15).
sphere_commentary.cross_series:
Series patterns align with design intents, but some overlaps emerge.
• HEALING DESCENT protocols cluster around 7.0 mean (anxiety, overstim, sleep), with 95+ listener responses indicating high reliability.
• THRIVING HOLD protocols vary: Focus & Clarity peaks (T-FC-L3 mean=7.63) while Creative Flow lags (mean=6.74), suggesting tiered entrainment efficacy.
• TRANSFORMING protocols show the widest spread (std=1.87), with DESCENT mind clarity protocols (X-MC-L1 mean=6.75) outperforming ASCENT motivation (X-MD-L1 mean=6.36).
sphere_commentary.anomalies:
Several protocols exhibit pattern deviations requiring investigation.
• X-MD-L3 (mean=7.15, n=13, std=2.38) anomalously high-variance with cross-run drift (sim=0.659), suggesting unstable listener response patterns.
• T-FC-L1 (mean=6.46) underperforms vs model prediction (7.728) and displays highest "slightly busy" rhythm complaint rate (9/23).
• H-SL-L2 uniquely shows "Did NOT settle" responses (3/15) amid sleep protocols, with caregiver-dominant feedback (6/15).
• X-MC-L3 shows lowest mean (5.7) and highest std (2.45) in dataset, with bimodal distribution gap.
sphere_commentary.development_signals:
[CONVERGENT SIGNAL] X-MD-L3 (n=13) – high mean but extreme std; create L2 variant to test scalability and stability.
T-FC-L1 (n=41) – underperforms vs model prediction (7.728); investigate rhythm mismatch ("slightly busy" complaints dominate).
H-SL-L2 (n=45) – caregiver-dominant feedback with "Too busy" rhythm ratings; adjust Adviser routing for calm-seeking listeners.
X-MC-L3 (n=10) – bimodal distribution with gap at central scores; test frequency sweep reduction or extended hold phase.
X-ME-L1 (n=39) – cross-bucket model preference across 6 zones; elevate as universal protocol candidate.
H-OS-L1 (n=95) – high outcome with growing views (30); amplify promotion as discovery pathway.
sphere_commentary.embedding_analysis: Embedding drift analysis reveals substantive analytical shifts (similarity <0.85 for 18 protocols). TRANSFORMING protocols show highest instability (X-MD-L3, sim=0.659). Semantic clustering demonstrates tight groupings within grooves (X-MD-L3↔X-MD-L2, 0.958 similarity), while T-CF-L1 (mean_sim=0.695) and X-MD-L2 (mean_sim=0.692) emerge as analytically isolated. Confidence moderate: drift likely reflects both data evolution and model variance.
